main.description: Register an XRPC endpoint with the dispatcher. Returns a cryptographically random serviceId. Share `did:web:HOST#<serviceId>` with callers so they can route to your endpoint via PDS service proxying through this dispatcher.

actor.description: DID of the registrant. Must match the service-auth token issuer.

endpoint.description: Base URL the dispatcher will forward matched XRPC calls to (e.g. https://my-service.example.com).

nsids.description: Optional allow-list of NSIDs this registration handles. Omit to accept any NSID.

ttlSeconds.description: Registration TTL in seconds. Omit for no expiry.

expiresAt.description: ISO-8601 expiry timestamp, if ttlSeconds was set.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: Missing or invalid inter-service auth token.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: actor does not match token issuer.

deregister.description: Remove a previously registered serviceId. Only the original registrant (matched by DID) may deregister.
